description: This file defines a Bootstrap component class 'Collapse' for creating collapsible UI elements, including methods for toggling, showing, hiding, and managing related events and DOM interactions.

classes.name: Collapse
classes.description: A class extending BaseComponent to implement collapsible UI behavior with methods for toggling, showing, hiding, and managing transition states.

methods.name: toggle
methods.description: Toggles the collapse element between expanded and collapsed states.

methods.name: show
methods.description: Expands the collapse element, handling transition and active sibling elements.

methods.name: hide
methods.description: Collapses the element, handling transition and updating ARIA attributes.

methods.name: _isShown
methods.description: Checks if the collapse element is currently shown.

methods.name: _getDimension
methods.description: Returns the dimension ('width' or 'height') used for the collapse transition.

methods.name: _initializeChildren
methods.description: Initializes child toggle elements within the parent container.

methods.name: _getFirstLevelChildren
methods.description: Finds first-level child elements matching a selector.

methods.name: _addAriaAndCollapsedClass
methods.description: Updates ARIA attributes and CSS classes for trigger elements based on collapse state.

methods.name: jQueryInterface
methods.description: Enables jQuery plugin interface for the Collapse component.
